title: Policy: Policy applied - Turn off WiFi
scenario: Verify that policy-affected settings remain locked and show an offline modification popup when Wi-Fi is turned off on a device with policies applied.
steps: Ensure the device has policies applied (e.g., via MDM or configuration profile).
Turn off Wi-Fi on the device.
Attempt to modify a setting that is affected by the applied policies.
Observe the behavior when trying to modify the locked setting.
expected: Policy-affected settings remain locked and cannot be modified. A popup is displayed indicating that settings cannot be modified offline.
